reference: My brother's wife is twenty-nine years old and is suffering from a severe cough and fever at night. She is suspected to have pneumonia and tuberculosis, but the X-ray did not show any results. We went to our family doctor, and according to his suggestion, we had a scan done. He is saying that it is primary complex. Is there any chance of primary complex affecting her? Her hemoglobin level is ten.
text: My brother's wife is 29 years old and is suffering from a severe cough and fever at night. She is suspected to have pneumonia and tuberculosis, but the X-ray did not show any results. We went to our family doctor, and according to his suggestion, a scan was done. He is saying that it is primary complex. Is there any chance of primary complex affecting her? Her hemoglobin level is 10.
